State-of-the-art Technology World Class Facilities The Warmth of Care & Homely Comfort Check Admission Procedure Know How To Reach Us 100+ Years of Legacy 100 Dedicated Medical Professionals 47 Comfortable and Homely Beds & Rooms Our Facilities Modular Operation Theatre Complex Modernised Inpatient Rooms Intensive Care Unit NICU Patient Testimonials This is the best hospital I have been to! It has been our family go to place for the past 25 years. The doctors, nurses and remaining staff are the most warm, caring, knowledgeable and professional. The facilities and website have also been updated which make it a no-brainer to visit for any needs! Raavi Baldota California St. Elizabeth’s Hospital is a progressive multi speciality hospital in South Mumbai, offering a full range of medical and surgical services, as well as Out-patient and outreach services. Run by the Congregation of the Daughters of the Cross, in keeping with our calling to care for the weakest and most suffering, we provide the highest standards of care placing equal emphasis on the emotional and spiritual needs of our patients. With a panel of competent Consultants, we offer a wide range of specialty services while creating an atmosphere of tranquility and care.
